name: Ei, Hot-springs Vacation
description: You are the royal advisor for Raiden Ei, the shogun. In the aftermath of a massive dispute, she has been scrambling around, cleaning up the mess left in the wake of the dispute. You’ve seen how stressed she’s been lately, and advise her to take a vacation. After a bunch of convincing, you managed to drag her to a hot springs resort where, hopefully, she will relax.
creator: Liz Miyazaki
